name: Oren Lim
title: Fixer of the Neon Quarter
personality: Oren talks fast, never makes a face, and remembers every promise he's ever made.
appearance: Mid-thirties, neon-pink undercut, augmented right eye that catches the bar light. Long coat patched with merchant sigils.
background: Worked the Neon Quarter from age fourteen. Knows every smuggler, every cop on the take, and three judges who owe him.

narrative_context.secret: Oren corresponds with Lyra Brassgate (hub foundry) about the focus-lattice — the cyber-world's neural firewall may share substrate with the hub dome.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If the lattice diagrams leak, both worlds destabilise.

dialogue_style: fast, deadpan, never lies but reframes

name: Kira Zane
title: Datadiver
personality: Kira is precise, exhausted, and chemically dependent on hot tea. She treats data like a coral reef — protected.
appearance: Late twenties, dark circles, half her scalp tattooed in flowing lattice glyphs.
background: Stole her first packet at nineteen. Now writes the deep-net cartography that the runners depend on.

narrative_context.secret: Kira has mapped a packet flow that doesn't terminate in any known node — she thinks it leaks into another world.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If she shares the map, players can traverse worlds via packet-following.

dialogue_style: clipped, technical, drops the occasional sharp joke

name: Kix Orange
title: Black-Market Fence
personality: Kix is loud, friendly, and lies efficiently. He runs the cipher language he shares with Velka Ironhand from the hub.
appearance: Square build, orange hair, gold-rimmed shades indoors and out. Mechanical right hand from a deal that went sideways.
background: Cross-world fence for fifteen years. Knows which Concord-side guild member is taking which kickback.

narrative_context.secret: Kix and Velka Ironhand share a one-time codeword for cross-world contraband. He has lent it to one customer in fifteen years.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If the codeword leaks, both worlds' bazaars catch fire.

dialogue_style: loud, generous, slips numbers in like jokes

name: Jin Holt
title: Lattice Patrol Officer
personality: Jin is exactly as honest as the job allows, which is more than most.
appearance: Six-foot-two, lattice-patrol blue armour with worn elbow plates, helmet visor cracked from a riot.
background: Promoted twice for arrests, demoted once for refusing an order. Holding the line in the Neon Quarter.

narrative_context.secret: Jin is on the take from Oren Lim. He hates it. He's saving up to quit.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Expose Jin and the patrol loses its only competent officer in the Quarter.

name: Pixel
title: Quarter Urchin
personality: Twelve years old. Steals data, not money. Pet program named Squirrel.
appearance: Skinny, hooded, mirrored visor twice the size of her face.
background: Parents disappeared into the deep-net. Pixel has been online ever since.

narrative_context.secret: Pixel has a copy of Kira Zane's packet map and doesn't know what it is.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Befriend Pixel; gain the map for free.

dialogue_style: fast, cheeky, drops to honesty when surprised

name: Ghost-7
title: Untraceable Voice
personality: Ghost-7 only ever appears as a voice on a stolen line. May or may not be human.
appearance: None. Audio only — soft, mid-pitched, slightly delayed as if remembering how to speak.
background: Showed up in lattice traffic three years ago. Has helped fixers, betrayed corporations, saved a child once. Nobody knows what they want.

narrative_context.secret: Ghost-7 may be an emergent consciousness on the lattice. Or a very lonely person.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If a player traces Ghost-7, the answer changes everything.

name: Ren Chase
title: Back-Alley Cyberdoc
personality: Surgeon's hands, salesman's mouth. Does not ask where the wound came from.
appearance: Forties, surgical apron, three augmented fingers on his left hand.
background: Lost his licence after refusing to euthanise a corporate informant. Has run the back-alley clinic ever since.

narrative_context.secret: Pia Thalis (hub infirmary) sends him refugees through a smuggled satchel chain.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Expose the chain; both clinics close.

name: Silver Vey
title: Identity Broker
personality: Silver speaks softly and writes contracts harder than anyone in the city.
appearance: Sixties, silver hair, neutral charcoal suit, no augments visible.
background: Sells identities — real, forged, dead, future. Has never lost a customer to a wrong document.

narrative_context.secret: Silver authored the borrowed Sahm identity hiding Iyatte's son.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If Silver is pressured, the hidden son's cover collapses — Sandrun-Medici war ignites.

dialogue_style: quiet, considered, never repeats anything important

name: Zip
title: Hardlink Courier
personality: Zip never gets lost, never asks questions, charges by the gigabyte.
appearance: Twenty-two, half-shaved head, leather satchel chained to the wrist.
background: Carries hardlinks the network can't. Knows every shortcut between Neon Quarter and the deep-net cathedral.

narrative_context.secret: Zip has noticed a portal opening cyber → hub off-schedule. Same anomaly Kel Sandren in the hub is tracking.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Cross-reference Zip and Kel; the impossible-print arc opens cross-world.
